---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve D-School 2049
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 125, Firefox 127, Safari 17]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Screen Resolution**: [e.g., 1920x1080]
- **User Role**: [e.g., Admin, Teacher, Student, Parent]
- **School**: [e.g., Greenfield Academy]

## Console Errors

```text
Paste any browser console errors here
```

## API Response (if applicable)

```json
{
  "endpoint": "/api/...",
  "status": 500,
  "response": {}
}
```

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — Application crash, data loss, security issue
- [ ] High — Major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium — Feature partially broken, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — Minor cosmetic issue

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
